mapping_orders.question: Mark the primary base camp and logistics staging area near the Faro a Colón. Coordinates: 18.4795, -69.8682.
We need to establish an Incident Command Post (ICP) immediately at 18.4735, -69.8975.
Set up a field medical post to receive casualties near Hospital Darío Contreras. Location is 18.4800, -69.8600.
Add a structural hazard to the map. There is severe damage to the bridge structure at Puente Duarte: 18.4832, -69.8805.
Mark a confirmed survivor pinned under debris in the Zona Colonial sector. Coordinates: 18.4750, -69.8835.
Designate a helicopter Landing Zone (LZ) for emergency medevac operations inside the Estadio Olímpico. Coordinates are 18.4845, -69.9145.
Record the last known position of a missing search team member near Parque del Este at 18.4745, -69.8500.
Deploy a water distribution point for the civilian population near Plaza de la Bandera. Mark it at 18.4475, -69.9650.
Warning: Chemical spill detected at an industrial facility at 18.4950, -69.9320. Mark as an active hazard.
Add a secondary maritime evacuation point at the Puerto de Sans Souci: 18.4720, -69.8780.
Mark my current location as the forward observation post for Sector B.
Add a casualty collection point at my location. The rescue team is staging here.
Register my GPS position as the command post for the southern sector operation.
